results.justification: KL regularizer between policy and reference is structurally identical to the KL non-redundancy regularizer; different motivation (stay-close vs stay-far) but same mathematical machinery.
Reference (fixed) policy + residual is EXACT TWIN structurally for the harp+penillion design; only differs in residual direction (additive vs counterpoint).
Below threshold — discusses regularizer family alternatives, not 2-agent design.
ECON treats multi-LLM as Nash equilibrium with hierarchical aggregator — direct functional twin for harmonic-resolution aggregation.
Du 2023 MAD with aggregator majority-voting is the canonical 2+ agent debate with aggregator — PENILLION asymmetric variant.
Heterogeneous role-adaptive agents covers fixed-vs-improvised asymmetry.
Same canonical MAD lineage; aggregation literature root.
Adaptive stability detection + consensus optimizer covers harmonic-resolution aggregation.
